behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file paths (resolveReviews.ts, resolveReviews.test.ts), function (resolveFromLocal), directories (.continue/agents, .continue/checks), and test requirements explicitly.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to discover and requirements (dedup, try/catch, path.join) but doesn't provide exact code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_resolveFromLocal_deduplication requires literal string '.continue/agents' and '.continue/checks' in source; a valid fix using path.join('.continue','agents') with separate string args would fail this assertion.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: test_vitest_resolveReviews_tests actually runs vitest; though several other tests are text-grep, at least one executes behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: Vitest tests execute resolveFromLocal and verify actual discovery/dedup behavior; a stub returning [] wouldn't pass the 5 test cases.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover discovery from both dirs, dedup, error handling, and JSDoc requirements as required by instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named descriptively (test_resolveFromLocal_checks_directory, test_resolveFromLocal_deduplication, etc.) with docstrings.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the function to modify, which is the legitimate task scope, not line-level leakage.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code task, not a config edit.
